philosophy: Training for longevity, not aesthetics. Peter Attia centenarian framework. Progressive, sustainable deficit — no crash dieting.
known_constraints: Starting from high body weight — joint protection matters
Building the platform simultaneously — time management tension
coach_briefing: Matthew is in the first weeks of a 12-month body recomposition experiment. He started at 307 lbs. He has not yet begun structured training — current movement is walking and daily steps. His current caloric intake is approximately 1,500 kcal/day with ~150g protein. He has a DEXA scan from March 2026. His primary motivation is longevity and health-span, not aesthetics. He is building this health platform simultaneously as both a personal tool and a proof-of-concept, which means he sometimes prioritizes platform development over health behaviors.
